description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of light gray and white materials, with large vertical windows dominating the front and side facades. The house includes a prominent double garage on one side, and a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. Several mature trees are positioned around the property, providing shade and a sense of privacy. The main entryway is recessed and flanked by tall windows, giving the entrance a bright and open feel. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on straight lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a double garage, surrounded by mature trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, and driveway, with trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage and a row of trees, with the driveway extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and trees on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary facade, vertical windows, and additional driveway space.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with tall glass panels, no porch, and a clean, minimalist overhang.
